response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and polyglot development skills with extensive experience in web, mobile, and distributed systems. However, his background lacks deep, sustained focus on C++ and large-scale cloud compute infrastructure, which are critical for this role. His leadership and mentoring experience is present but not explicitly tied to cloud or DevOps contexts.
strengths: Broad technical expertise across multiple languages (TypeScript, Node.js, Dlang, C++) and domains (web, mobile, embedded, distributed systems).
Proven leadership in mentoring, workshops, and technical talks, indicating strong communication and knowledge-sharing skills.
Experience with open-source projects and infrastructure tooling (Kubernetes, Docker), showing initiative and hands-on problem-solving.
concerns: Only limited and outdated C++ experience (last noted in 2015 at National Instruments), falling short of the 8-year requirement.
No explicit mention of production-level cloud architecture or compute platform leadership, despite some cloud-adjacent work (AWS CDK).
Leadership roles are developer-focused rather than technical leadership of cloud or infrastructure teams, missing preferred qualifications.
